final:
module binary_counter_4bit(
	input clk,
	input rst,
	output reg [3:0] count
);

	  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
		if (rst) begin
			count <= 4'b0000;
		end
		else begin
			count <= count + 1;
		end
	end

endmodule
